page_metadata.biotools__summary: Framework for the development of desktop client applications. It is able to integrate meta-data of different Web-services catalogues. Its main characteristic is that it is modular and adaptable to different usage scenarios.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Framework for the development of desktop client applications. It is able to integrate meta-data of different Web-services catalogues. Its main characteristic is that it is modular and adaptable to different usage scenarios.
